name: Anvil Strike
description: Heavy blacksmith anvil ringing with authority

prompts.label: heavy blacksmith anvil struck with iron hammer
prompts.text: heavy blacksmith anvil struck with iron hammer, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: dense metal impact ringing with authoritative sustain
prompts.text: dense metal impact ringing with authoritative sustain, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: forge hammer landing with deep resonant clang
prompts.text: forge hammer landing with deep resonant clang, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: hot iron sizzling on anvil face after strike
prompts.text: hot iron sizzling on anvil face after strike, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: workshop anvil bell tone echoing through stone walls
prompts.text: workshop anvil bell tone echoing through stone walls, submarine pressure hull, copper pipe resonance ping, precision clockwork ticking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, smooth fade out
